data.content: Plan approved for implementation. The revised rollbackIteration coverage now matches the current contract: unknown leases return NOT_FOUND, updateKnot failures retain the lease, and note writes are correctly gated by truthy note content plus knots repo type. Sections 1-4 remain feasible and complete for rollbackBeatState, pre-dispatch rollback, step-failure rollback, and invariant enforcement. No knot invariants are present, and the work remains test-only across the four planned files.
